All Guides

Welcome to Oahu’s Best Kayaking

Come experience world-class kayaking in Kailua out to or grab our gear and head up to for a kayaking and hiking adventure. We provide you with offshore islan...

Come experience world-class kayaking in Kailua out to Popoi’a (Flat island) and Ne Mokulua (the Twin Islands) or grab our gear and head up to Mokoli’i (Chinaman’s Hat) for a kayaking and hiking adventure. We provide you with offshore island landing permits, special foam pads, straps, and all the gear you need for an awesome adventure.

FREESNORKEL

Use this code when you book to get your first snorkel set rental for free

You’re just a short drive away from a paddling paradise

We’ll get you your gear and you’ll be off on your adventure.

Our storefront is a short 30 minute hop from Waikiki.

Check out all of our Activities

Select the items to find out more about each activity. Book online to get priority service!

Inspired to Explore?

Book your Oahu kayak, e-bike, or rental adventure with Active Oahu Tours today.

More Oahu Adventure Guides

Active Oahu, LLC Wins 2022 Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice Award for Tours and Activities

Laie, Hawaii – July 28, 2022 – Active Oahu, LLC today announced it has been recognized by Tripadvisor as a 2022 Travelers’ Choice award winner for Tours and Activities.  The award celebrates businesses that have received great traveler reviews from travelers around the globe on Tripadvisor over t...

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
